overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with blue hair exploring an elevated walkway in a futuristic Japanese-inspired district. The scene blends traditional pagoda architecture with towering cyberpunk megastructures, neon signage, and industrial elements under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway approaching traditional Japanese architecture

events.description: character begins ascending slight ramp toward the red traditional building
character passes close to building entrance, temporarily obscuring view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated walkway toward traditional red Japanese building with steam vents

notable_agents.action: character with blue hair and white outfit walking ahead of camera
figure in yellow jacket crouching near vending machine at walkway start

entered.detail: teal-colored vending machine with glowing interface
multi-tiered pagoda-style structure with curved black roofs and red wooden walls
concrete pedestrian bridge with metal railings overlooking lower levels
tall futuristic skyscraper with stacked modular architecture
large digital advertisement screen showing colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated concrete walkway in a cyberpunk city, following a character with blue hair toward a striking red traditional Japanese building. The walkway is flanked by metal railings and a vending machine, with futuristic towers visible in the background. The character walks steadily forward as steam rises from vents near the traditional structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: corner overlook with view to street below

events.description: turning right at building corner to overlook street level with traffic
stopping to look down at street traffic and surrounding buildings

agents.ego_description: turning right at the corner of the traditional building to observe the street below and surrounding architecture

notable_agents.action: woman standing against building wall looking at handheld device

entered.detail: large cyan neon arrow pointing left mounted on building corner
view down to multi-lane street with vehicles and crosswalks below
cluster of teal and green residential towers with multiple balconies
simple concrete seating along the walkway railing

segments.scene_description: The character turns right at the corner of the red traditional building, entering a sheltered overlook area. A neon arrow sign glows cyan on the building wall as the view opens to a street below with sparse traffic. Green apartment towers rise in the distance while the character stops to observe the urban landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated observation point overlooking cyberpunk cityscape

events.description: panning up from street view to focus on skyline and megastructures
flying vehicle passes overhead between the towering buildings

agents.ego_description: stopping to pan around and observe the surrounding megacity architecture, industrial chimneys, and skyline

entered.detail: colossal futuristic tower with intricate stacked architecture and large ventilation fans
tall smokestacks emitting white steam into the sky
elevated transport tube connecting two massive structures
small aerial craft flying between buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera pans upward to reveal a breathtaking cyberpunk skyline dominated by a colossal mega-building with ventilation fans and connecting skybridges. Industrial chimneys emit steam into the clear blue sky while a flying vehicle passes overhead. The traditional red building recedes into the left background as the view opens to the vast urban expanse.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with neon advertisements

events.description: resuming walk along covered pedestrian walkway with overhead shelter
passing by various NPCs and large advertisement posters on the wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered walkway past various pedestrians, benches, and neon signs while overlooking the city

notable_agents.action: person in orange jacket leaning on green railing looking at city view
person in red crop top leaning against building wall

entered.detail: overhanging roof structure providing partial shade with red paper lanterns hanging
large digital billboards displaying colorful animated advertisements
vertical posters on the building wall including one with '2nd Amendment' text
tall palm tree visible against the skyline

segments.scene_description: The character resumes walking along a covered section of the elevated walkway, passing under an overhang with hanging red lanterns. The path is lined with neon advertisements and posters on the left wall, while pedestrians lean on the right railing to view the city. Industrial towers and smokestacks remain visible in the background as the walkway continues through the bustling cyberpunk district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along an elevated walkway that transitions from an intimate encounter with traditional architecture to a sweeping reveal of a colossal cyberpunk skyline. It begins by following a blue-haired character toward a striking red Japanese building where steam rises from nearby vents against a backdrop of futuristic towers. As the character turns a corner past a glowing cyan neon arrow, the scene opens into a sheltered overlook providing a view of the streets and green apartment towers below. The camera then pans upward to reveal a breathtaking urban expanse dominated by a massive mega-building with ventilation fans and flying vehicles crossing a clear blue sky. Finally, the view shifts back to the character as they walk under an overhang of hanging red lanterns and neon advertisements, continuing through the bustling district with industrial smokestacks lingering in the distance.
